atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines design tokens and theme variables inline in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: registers a custom utility class.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: explicitly adds a source path for content scanning.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a Tailwind plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a Tailwind config file.
